License.title: License
License.description: A driving license record containing a file (PDF or Image) for verification.

cnic.description: The CNIC number of the license holder (e.g., 35202-1234567-1).

fileUrl.description: A URL to the uploaded PDF or image of the license.

fileType.description: The type of the uploaded file.

uploadedAt.description: The timestamp when the license was uploaded.
